front.title: A wolf pelt
front.description:
It must have been a majestic beast, finely preserved with pale stones for eyes and a clip to wear it like a hooded cape. But no matter how you scrub, the red stains never come off its teeth.

The pelt is home to a powerful spirit, not just of a wolf but of The Hunt itself.

content.text: To unlock its secrets, you must…
… hunt a beast by moonlight, alone, while wearing the pelt.
… tear out its liver with your bare hands or teeth and eat it, raw.

back.title: Call of the Hunt
back.description:
When you **_howl at the rising moon, face smeared in blood and wearing only the pelt_**, you take on the aspect of a wolf and call a pack to your side. Name your quarry and roll…

- … +1 if you have their scent;
- … +1 if they are alone, but -1 if not; and
- … -1 if they would not fear a pack of wolves.
**On 7+**, you corner your prey and deal 2d6+4 damage (*messy*) before the pack disperses and you cast off your wolf-self; **on a 6+**, also pick 1; **on a 7-9**, also pick 2:

- Your pack savages one or more innocents
- You suffer 2d6+4 *messy* damage yourself
- Your instinct becomes "to act like a bloodthirsty wolf" until you Level Up.
**On a 6-**, your prey eludes you and you must still pick 2 from the list above.

moves.name: When you howl at the rising moon, face smeared in blood and wearing only the pelt
moves.text: You take on the aspect of a wolf and call a pack to your side. Name your quarry and roll (+1 if you have their scent, +1 if they are alone/-1 if not, -1 if they would not fear a pack). On 7+, you corner your prey and deal 2d6+4 damage (messy) before dispersing. On 6+, also pick 1; on 7-9, also pick 2 from: pack savages innocents; you suffer 2d6+4 messy damage; your instinct becomes wolflike until Level Up. On 6-, your prey eludes you and you still pick 2.
